FROM [Doctors] AS [d]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [d0].[DoctorsId], [d0].[SpecializationsId], [d1].[Id], [d1].[Name]
    FROM [DoctorDoctorSpecialization] AS [d0]
    INNER JOIN [DoctorSpecializations] AS [d1] ON [d0].[SpecializationsId] = [d1].[Id]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[ConsultationFee], [d].[FullName], [d].[PhoneNumber], [s].[DoctorsId], [s].[SpecializationsId], [s].[Id], [s].[Name]
FROM [Doctors] AS [d]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [d0].[DoctorsId], [d0].[SpecializationsId], [d1].[Id], [d1].[Name]
    FROM [DoctorDoctorSpecialization] AS [d0]
    INNER JOIN [DoctorSpecializations] AS [d1] ON [d0].[SpecializationsId] = [d1].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [d].[Id] = [s].[DoctorsId]
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [s].[DoctorsId], [s].[SpecializationsId]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[ConsultationFee], [d].[FullName], [d].[PhoneNumber], [s].[DoctorsId], [s].[SpecializationsId], [s].[Id], [s].[Name]
FROM [Doctors] AS [d]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [d0].[DoctorsId], [d0].[SpecializationsId], [d1].[Id], [d1].[Name]
    FROM [DoctorDoctorSpecialization] AS [d0]
    INNER JOIN [DoctorSpecializations] AS [d1] ON [d0].[SpecializationsId] = [d1].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [d].[Id] = [s].[DoctorsId]
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [s].[DoctorsId], [s].[SpecializationsId]

SELECT [d2].[Id], [d2].[ConsultationFee], [d2].[FullName], [d2].[PhoneNumber], [s].[DoctorsId], [s].[SpecializationsId], [s].[Id], [s].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [d].[Id], [d].[ConsultationFee], [d].[FullName], [d].[PhoneNumber]
    FROM [Doctors] AS [d]
    WHERE [d].[Id] = @id
) AS [d2]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [d0].[DoctorsId], [d0].[SpecializationsId], [d1].[Id], [d1].[Name]

FROM [Doctors] AS [d]
LEFT JOIN (

FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
INNER JOIN [Doctors] AS [d] ON [a].[DoctorId] = [d].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Patients] AS [p] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Prescriptions] AS [p0] ON [a].[Id] = [p0].[AppointmentId]
LEFT JOIN [Medicines] AS [m] ON [p0].[Id] = [m].[PrescriptionId]
ORDER BY [a].[Id], [d].[Id], [p].[Id], [u].[Id], [p0].[Id]

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AppointmentDate], [a].[DoctorId], [a].[Notes], [a].[PatientId], [a].[Status], [d].[Id], [d].[ConsultationFee], [d].[FullName], [d].[PhoneNumber], [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[PhoneNumber], [p].[UserId], [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Role], [p0].[Id], [p0].[AppointmentId], [p0].[Instructions], [p0].[IssuedDate], [m].[Id], [m].[Dosage], [m].[Name], [m].[PrescriptionId], [m].[Price]
FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
INNER JOIN [Doctors] AS [d] ON [a].[DoctorId] = [d].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Patients] AS [p] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Prescriptions] AS [p0] ON [a].[Id] = [p0].[AppointmentId]
LEFT JOIN [Medicines] AS [m] ON [p0].[Id] = [m].[PrescriptionId]
ORDER BY [a].[Id], [d].[Id], [p].[Id], [u].[Id], [p0].[Id]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[ConsultationFee], [d].[FullName], [d].[PhoneNumber], [s0].[Id], [s0].[Name], [s0].[DoctorsId], [s0].[SpecializationsId]
FROM [Doctors] AS [d]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [d3].[Id], [d3].[Name], [d2].[DoctorsId], [d2].[SpecializationsId]
    FROM [DoctorDoctorSpecialization] AS [d2]
    INNER JOIN [DoctorSpecializations] AS [d3] ON [d2].[SpecializationsId] = [d3].[Id]
) AS [s0] ON [d].[Id] = [s0].[DoctorsId]
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [DoctorDoctorSpecialization] AS [d0]
    INNER JOIN [DoctorSpecializations] AS [d1] ON [d0].[SpecializationsId] = [d1].[Id]
    WHERE [d].[Id] = [d0].[DoctorsId] AND [d1].[Name] IN (
        SELECT [s].[value]
        FROM OPENJSON(@searchKeys) WITH ([value] nvarchar(max) '$') AS [s]
    ))
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [s0].[DoctorsId], [s0].[SpecializationsId]

    ELSE N''
END, CASE
    WHEN [p0].[Id] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Medicines] AS [m]
        WHERE [p0].[Id] = [m].[PrescriptionId]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [d].[Id], [p].[Id], [u].[Id], [p0].[Id], [m0].[Name], [m0].[Id]
FROM [Appointments] AS [a]

INNER JOIN [Patients] AS [p] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[UserId] = [u].[Id]

LEFT JOIN [Medicines] AS [m0] ON [p0].[Id] = [m0].[PrescriptionId]

        FROM [Medicines] AS [m]
        WHERE [p0].[Id] = [m].[PrescriptionId]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [d].[Id], [p].[Id], [u].[Id], [p0].[Id], [m0].[Name], [m0].[Id]

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AppointmentDate], [a].[Status], [a].[PatientId], [a].[DoctorId], [d].[FullName], [u].[FullName], [a].[Notes], CASE
    WHEN [p0].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [p0].[Instructions]
    ELSE N''
END, CASE
    WHEN [p0].[Id] IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Medicines] AS [m]
        WHERE [p0].[Id] = [m].[PrescriptionId]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [d].[Id], [p].[Id], [u].[Id], [p0].[Id], [m0].[Name], [m0].[Id]
FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
INNER JOIN [Doctors] AS [d] ON [a].[DoctorId] = [d].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Patients] AS [p] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Prescriptions] AS [p0] ON [a].[Id] = [p0].[AppointmentId]
LEFT JOIN [Medicines] AS [m0] ON [p0].[Id] = [m0].[PrescriptionId]
ORDER BY [a].[Id], [d].[Id], [p].[Id], [u].[Id], [p0].[Id]
